title: Wood Manger Scene
summary: A small cedar stable for a Nativity, cut from a single fence picket with beveled roof and sides. Hot glue holds it together — a quick holiday build.
description:
A little wooden stable to house a Nativity scene, cut entirely from one cedar fence picket. Cedar's warm color and rough texture suit the rustic manger look, and a fence picket is dirt cheap — nominally 5-1/2" wide, 1/2" thick, and 6 feet long, so one picket makes the whole thing.

The only real cuts are the 25° bevels on the tops of the sides and the roof pieces, which give the stable its peaked roof. Cut the bottom and sides, attach the sides to the bottom with the bevels oriented so the long point is on the inside, then build the peaked roof.

It's assembled with hot glue in the original — fast and plenty strong for a decorative piece — though you can nail or staple it if you prefer something more permanent. For the back, trace the stable's outline onto 1/4" plywood, or plank it with more cedar picket for a consistent look. A simple, giftable holiday project you can finish in an afternoon.

tools.note: The 25° bevels on the sides and roof.
Cutting the back to the stable's shape.

materials.name: Plywood, 1/4", scrap
materials.note: Back — or plank with more picket.

cutList.note: Longest point; top end beveled 25° off square.
Longest point; top end beveled 25° off square.
Cut to fit the stable's shape.

steps.title: Attach the sides to the bottom
steps.body: Attach the two sides to the bottom, orienting the top angles so the bevel's long point is on the inside. This sets up the roof to sit correctly.

steps.title: Build the peaked roof
steps.body: Mark the roof pieces 1" in from the square-cut end to lay out the roof overhangs. Hot glue the two roof panels together at the peak, then attach the assembled roof to the sides.

steps.title: Add the back
steps.body: For the back, trace the stable's shape onto a piece of 1/4" plywood (or other backer) and cut it out, or plank the back with more cedar fence picket for a consistent look. Attach it and add your Nativity figures.

images.alt: Small cedar Nativity manger stable with a peaked roof
